data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of auto-refresh showing new availability, but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for real-time status updates and auto-refresh, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system successfully updates availability in real-time. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected behavior is not substantiated by any test results or system outputs.
gaps: No evidence of auto-refresh functionality showing new availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
